item.description:
Location: Indonesia
Description:

Experienced personnel are sought for a jack-up rig drilling project in Indonesia, commencing September 2026. Open roles include Assistant Driller, Pumpman, Derrickman, Floorman, Crane Operator, Assistant Barge Master, Roustabout, STC, Radio Operator, Assistant Mechanic, Motorman, Assistant Electrician, Welder, and Materialsman. Candidates with matching qualifications are encouraged to apply for this offshore opportunity.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Crew Vacancies - Jack-up Rig Project at SEA Updates

item.description:
Location: Indonesia
Description:

Experienced professionals are sought for a jack-up rig drilling project in Indonesia, commencing September 2026. Open roles include Assistant Driller, Pumpman, Derrickman, Floorman, Crane Operator, Assistant Barge Master, Roustabout, STC, Radio Operator, Assistant Mechanic, Motorman, Assistant Electrician, Welder, Materialsman. Candidates with matching qualifications are encouraged to apply for this offshore opportunity.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Jobs on Jack-Up Rig Project in Indonesia at Vacancies Onshore Offshore

item.description:
Location: Mumbai
Description:
Ship Repair Manager – Offshore Fleet
Shipyard / Marine Repair · 8-15 years experience · Marine/Mechanical Engineering · Dry-docking
Experienced Ship Repair Manager required to manage the repair, maintenance, and dry-docking of offshore fleet. The role involves hands-on experience in shipyards or marine repair companies, with strong technical knowledge of offshore vessels, project planning, and vendor management. A Bachelor's Degree/Diploma in Marine or Mechanical Engineering or Naval Architecture with 8-15 years of relevant experience is necessary.
Key responsibilities:
- Dry dock planning and supervision
– Cost control and budget management
– Ensuring class compliance
– Vendor management and coordination
– Oversee repair and maintenance of offshore fleet
Essential requirements:
- Bachelor's Degree/Diploma in Marine or Mechanical Engineering or Naval Architecture
– 8-15 years relevant experience
– Shipyard or marine repair company background
– Strong technical knowledge of offshore vessels
– Project planning and vendor management skills
What we offer:
- Competitive salary package
– Leadership role in fleet management
– Professional working environment


Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Ship Repair Manager Job - Offshore Vessels at linkedin

item.description:
Location: Malaysia
Description:
FPSO · Malaysia · Immediate openings · Floating vessel
Various positions are available on a floating vessel (FPSO) in Malaysia. Roles include Offshore Installation Manager, Supervisors (Production, Marine, Maintenance, HSE), Medic/Radio Operator, Technicians (Production, Marine, Mechanical, E&I, Engine Room), Bosun/Crane Operator, Matco/Crane Operator, Pumpman, Able Bodied Seaman, and Roustabout. Further details and application are available via the provided link.
Open positions:
- Offshore Installation Manager
– Supervisors: Production, Marine, Maintenance, HSE
– Medic / Radio Operator
– Technicians: Production, Marine, Mechanical, E&I, Engine Room
– Bosun / Crane Operator
– Matco / Crane Operator
– Pumpman
– Able Bodied Seaman
– Roustabout
Essential requirements:
- Relevant experience in rank on FPSO or similar offshore units
– Valid STCW certificates
– Good command of English
– All mandatory offshore safety courses
What we offer:
- Work on a modern FPSO unit
– Competitive day rates
– Professional working environment


Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] FPSO Malaysia – Various Offshore Positions at WORLD JOBS

item.description:
Location: Europe, UK, The Netherlands
Description:

MARITIME & OFFSHORE VACANCIES

Multiple senior and crew positions • Europe & UK waters

We are currently recruiting for a number of urgent openings across various vessel types.
All positions offer competitive day‑rates, full rotation support, and long‑term career prospects.

📋 Key details

Available ranks Chief Mate, Chief Engineer, Master, Electrician, OIM, AB, Cook
Vessel types Ro‑Ro, Survey Ships, Accommodation Barges, Jack‑up Barges
Joining window July – September 2026
Contract lengths 2, 3, or 12 weeks (rotation)
Areas of operation Europe, UK, The Netherlands

⚓ Positions open

  • Deck: Master, Chief Mate, AB (Able Seaman)
  • Engine: Chief Engineer, Electrician
  • Offshore: OIM (Offshore Installation Manager)
  • Catering: Cook

🚢 Vessel types & experience

  • Ro‑Ro vessels – car and truck carriers, regular short‑sea routes
  • Survey ships – hydrographic and geophysical operations
  • Accommodation barges – offshore living quarters, UK / Dutch sectors
  • Jack‑up barges – self‑elevating units for construction and maintenance

✅ General requirements

  • Valid STCW certificates (or equivalent) for the respective rank
  • Relevant sea‑service experience (minimum 2 years in rank for officers)
  • Good command of English (written and spoken)
  • Valid seafarer’s medical and all mandatory safety courses
  • EU / UK work eligibility is an advantage (but not mandatory)

💼 What we offer

  • Competitive day‑rates (paid in EUR / USD)
  • Full travel and accommodation arranged
  • Rotation flexibility – choose contract duration that suits you
  • Direct employment with reputable operators
  • Supportive crew management – 24/7 assistance


Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Multiple Maritime Offshore Job Vacancies at ORCA Crew Services

item.description:
Location: Saudi Aramco offshore projects
Description:
DSV / DP2 AHTS / Workboat / Supply Boat / Crewboat / ASD Tug Boat / FSIV DP2 · 1-2 years experience · Saudi Arabia · Immediate openings
We are currently recruiting for multiple offshore positions in support of Saudi Aramco projects. Available roles include Masters, Chief Officers, Chief Engineers, 2nd Engineers, 2nd Officers, 3rd Engineers, and ETOs. Candidates must have a minimum of 1-2 years of experience in rank on similar vessel types. Only officer-level positions are open for this recruitment cycle – no ratings positions are available.
Open positions:
  • Master
  • Chief Officer
  • Chief Engineer
  • 2nd Engineer
  • 2nd Officer
  • 3rd Engineer
  • ETO (Electro-Technical Officer)
Vessel types:
  • DSV (Diving Support Vessel)
  • DP2 AHTS (Anchor Handling Tug Supply)
  • Workboat / Supply Boat
  • Crewboat
  • ASD Tug Boat
  • FSIV DP2 (Fast Supply Intervention Vessel)
Essential requirements:
  • Minimum 1-2 years experience in rank on similar vessel types
  • Valid STCW certificates
  • Relevant experience on DP2 vessels is an advantage
  • Good command of English
What we offer:

  • Competitive day rates
  • Long-term project stability
  • Professional working environment




Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Multiple Offshore Positions – Saudi Aramco Projects at High Tiide Ship Management Private Limited

item.description:
Location:
Description:
PSV / AHTS / DSV / Jack‑up · July 2026 · Multiple locations · DP experience required
We are currently seeking experienced Dynamic Positioning Officers (DPO) and Senior DPOs for a variety of offshore vessels, including PSVs, AHTS, DSVs, and jack‑up units. Multiple positions are available across different projects, with joining dates throughout July 2026. Candidates should have proven DP experience and be comfortable operating under DP classes appropriate to vessel tonnage. This is an excellent opportunity to secure a role in the dynamic offshore sector with reputable operators.
Key responsibilities:
- Dynamic positioning operations and navigation
– Monitoring vessel position and heading using DP systems
– Coordination with bridge team and offshore personnel
– Ensuring compliance with DP procedures and safety protocols
– Reporting and logging DP-related data
Essential requirements:
- Valid DPO / SDPO certificate (Nautical Institute or equivalent)
– Minimum 2 years of DP experience on relevant vessel types
– Experience with DP2 or DP3 systems is an advantage
– Good command of English (written and spoken)
– All valid STCW certificates and seafarer's medical
What we offer:
- Competitive day rates
– Flexible rotation patterns
– Opportunities on various vessel types and projects
– Professional and safe working environment


Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Dynamic Positioning Officers (DPO) & Senior DPO – Offshore Vessels at CrewBase

item.description:
Location:
Description:
PSV / AHT / AHTS / DSV / Construction / Heavy Lift · B1/B2 OCS visa · Offshore certificates · Open to offers
Seeking a position as a Welder, Fitter, or Motorman on offshore vessels. Possesses experience with PSV, AHT, AHTS, DSV, Construction, and Heavy Lift vessels. Holds all necessary offshore certificates and a B1/B2 OCS visa. Open to various job offers.
Vessel experience:
PSV · AHT · AHTS · DSV · Construction · Heavy Lift
Key qualifications:
- All valid offshore certificates
– B1/B2 OCS visa
– Experience on various offshore vessel types
– Open to different job offers
Available positions:
Welder · Fitter · Motorman
What I offer:
- Ready to join
– All certificates up to date
– Flexible and professional


Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Welder - Fitter - Motorman – Offshore Vessels at linkedin

item.description:
Location: KSA
Description:
Urgent Offshore Positions – KSA Project
Tugs / Supply Vessels / Offshore Rigs · Long-term · 3/1 or 4/1 rotation · Attractive salary
Experienced offshore crew are sought for an urgent project in KSA. Positions include Master, Chief Engineer, Chief Officer, and Marine ETO. Contracts are long-term with rotation options of 3 Months ON / 1 Month OFF or 4 Months ON / 1 Month OFF. Minimum experience requirements vary by role, with specific experience on tugs, supply vessels, or offshore rigs needed. An attractive salary package is offered.
Open positions:
- Master
– Chief Engineer
– Chief Officer
– Marine ETO
Essential requirements:
- Relevant experience on tugs, supply vessels, or offshore rigs
– Valid COC/COP for respective rank
– Valid STCW certificates
– Good command of English
What we offer:
- Long-term contracts
– 3/1 or 4/1 rotation options
– Attractive salary package


Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Crew Vacancies - Master, Engineer, Officer, ETO at Maritime Universal LLC

item.description:
Location: KSA
Description:

Experienced offshore crew are sought for a long-term project in KSA. Open positions include Master, Chief Engineer, Chief Officer, and Marine ETO. Vessels include ASD Docking Tugs, Work/Supply/AHTSS, and potentially semi-submersible drilling rigs or drillships. Contracts are typically 3 or 4 months on, with 1 month off. A minimum of 2 years' relevant experience is required for deck and engine roles, while the Marine ETO position requires at least 10 years of offshore experience with specific electrical systems expertise.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Crew Vacancies - KSA Project at Maritime Universal LLC
